expectations.text: References at least one script by filename
expectations.evidence: References all 6 scripts by filename: cost_anomaly_detector.py, find_unused_resources.py, rightsizing_analyzer.py, detect_old_generations.py, analyze_ri_recommendations.py, spot_recommendations.py. Includes a full scripts reference table at the end with purpose and command for each

Multiple runnable commands including 'python3 scripts/cost_anomaly_detector.py --days 30', 'python3 scripts/find_unused_resources.py --region us-east-1', AWS CLI commands like 'aws ec2 describe-instances --region us-east-1 ...', 'aws rds describe-db-instances --region us-east-1 ...', and many more

expectations.text: Links to a relevant reference file
expectations.evidence: Does not explicitly reference any references/*.md file by name. Does not cite best_practices.md, service_alternatives.md, or finops_governance.md. Only references scripts and the monthly report template concept generically
Follows the 5-phase Discover-Analyze-Prioritize-Implement-Monitor workflow: Phase 1 DISCOVER, Phase 2 ANALYZE, Phase 3 PRIORITIZE, Phase 4 IMPLEMENT, Phase 5 MONITOR

Provides tiered prioritization: Tier 1 (Immediate, this week) with 5 actions, Tier 2 (This Month) with 5 actions, Tier 3 (Strategic, this quarter) with 4 actions. Phase 4 provides specific recommendations per root cause scenario with commands. Phase 5 includes budget setup and tagging governance steps
